title: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. Announces First Quarter Results
author: Na
description: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. announced its first quarter 2025 cash distribution of $0.725835 per common unit, payable on May 15, 2025 to common unitholders of record as of May 5, 2025.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company announced a cash distribution to its unitholders, which is a positive sign for investors.

title: Dorchester Minerals exec buys $158k in company stock - Investing.com
author: Investing.Com
description: A Dorchester Minerals executive has purchased $158,000 worth of the company's stock, signaling confidence in the company's future prospects. The transactions were made under a pre-arranged trading plan, reflecting the executive's belief in the company's potential growth or undervaluation.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The executive's significant investment in the company's stock suggests a strong vote of confidence in Dorchester Minerals' future prospects. Insider buying is often seen as a positive signal for a company's potential growth or undervaluation.

title: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. Announces First Quarter Results
author: Dorchester Minerals, L.P.
description: DALLAS, May  02, 2024  (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Dorchester Minerals, L.P. (the “Partnership”) (NASDAQ-DMLP) announced today the Partnership’s net income for the quarter ended March 31, 2024 of $18,167,000, or $0.44 per common unit.

title: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. Announces Its First Quarter Distribution
author: Dorchester Minerals, L.P.
description: DALLAS, April  18, 2024  (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Dorchester Minerals, L.P. (NASDAQ:DMLP) announced today the Partnership’s first quarter 2024 cash distribution. The distribution of $0.781837 per common unit represents activity for the three-month period ended March 31, 2024 and is payable on May 9, 2024 to common unitholders of record as of April 29, 2024.

title: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. Announces 2023 Results
author: Dorchester Minerals, L.P.
description: DALLAS, Feb.  22, 2024  (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Dorchester Minerals, L.P. (the “Partnership”) (NASDAQ-DMLP) announced today the Partnership’s net income for the year ended December 31, 2023 of $114,117,000 or $2.85 per common unit.
